---
name: 🚀 Feature Request
about: Suggest an idea or enhancement for OwlRoadmap
title: "[Feature]: "
labels: ["enhancement", "needs-discussion"]
assignees: ""
---

## 🚀 Feature Summary

<!-- A one-sentence summary of the feature you'd like to see. -->

## 💡 Problem / Motivation

<!-- Describe the problem this feature would solve. Why is this needed?
     e.g. "I'm frustrated when..." or "It would be great if..." -->

## 🎯 Proposed Solution

<!-- How should this feature work? Be as detailed as possible. -->

## 🔄 Alternatives Considered

<!-- Have you thought of other ways to achieve the same result? List them here. -->

## 🖼️ Mockups / Examples

<!-- Attach any wireframes, sketches, or links to similar implementations. -->

## 📦 Affected Area

<!-- Which part of the codebase would this change? (Select all that apply) -->

- [ ] README Builder
- [ ] Roadmap Builder
- [ ] GitHub Integration / Analyzer
- [ ] Owl AI Assistant
- [ ] Export Studio
- [ ] Analytics Dashboard
- [ ] Workspace System
- [ ] Public Share Pages
- [ ] Themes
- [ ] Documentation
- [ ] Other: ___

## ✔️ Checklist

- [ ] I searched existing issues and feature requests and this is not a duplicate.
- [ ] I am willing to help implement this feature (optional but appreciated!).
